title: An agent_versions pin matching the running build lets the run proceed
description: The positive complement to agent-version-pin-mismatch-fails-fast: when agent_versions pins the running agent at exactly its descriptor.agent_version, the run proceeds and converges normally. The ${AGENT_NAME} and ${AGENT_VERSION} fixture tokens expand to the agent under test's describe identity, so the pin matches by construction on every conforming agent. Also pins a second, unrelated agent name to prove foreign keys are ignored.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
